title: Missing a Flight and Finding a New Route

all.en: I will never forget the day I missed my flight from Tokyo back to Taipei.
all.zh: 我永遠忘不了從東京飛回臺北卻錯過班機的那一天。

all.en: Due to heavy traffic on the highway，I arrived at the airport just ten minutes too late.
all.zh: 由於高速公路嚴重塞車，我抵達機場時剛好遲了十分鐘。

all.en: The gate had already closed，and the staff told me I could not board the plane.
all.zh: 登機門已經關閉，工作人員告訴我無法登機。

all.en: I felt panicked and worried because I had an important meeting the next morning.
all.zh: 我感到驚慌又擔心，因為隔天早上有一個重要的會議。

all.en: After taking a deep breath，I went to the airline counter to ask for help.
all.zh: 深呼吸之後，我去航空公司櫃檯尋求協助。

all.en: The friendly agent suggested I take a connecting flight through Hong Kong instead.
all.zh: 友善的櫃檯人員建議我改搭經過香港的轉機航班。

all.en: Although the ticket cost a little extra，it was the only available option that day.
all.zh: 雖然機票多花了一點錢，但那是當天唯一可行的選擇。

all.en: I waited at the gate for several hours and used the time to send emails to my boss.
all.zh: 我在登機門等了好幾個小時，並利用這段時間寄電子郵件給我老闆。

all.en: When I finally arrived in Hong Kong，I had to rush to my next gate.
all.zh: 當我終於抵達香港時，我必須趕往下一個登機門。

all.en: Thanks to the kind staff，I made it home just in time for my meeting.
all.zh: 多虧了親切的員工，我剛好趕在會議前回到家。

all.en: Since then，I always arrive at the airport at least three hours early.
all.zh: 從那之後，我總是至少提前三個小時抵達機場。
